en: The words of King Lemuel. An oracle that his mother taught him:
zh: 利慕伊勒王的話，是 神的默示， 是他母親教訓他的：

en: What are you doing, my son? What are you doing, son of my womb? What are you doing, son of my vows?
zh: “我兒， 我腹中生的兒啊！ 我許願所得的兒啊，我要對你說甚麼呢？

en: Do not give your strength to women, your ways to those who destroy kings.
zh: 不要把你的精力給婦女， 也不要有敗壞君王的行為。

en: It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine, or for rulers to take strong drink,
zh: 利慕伊勒啊！君王不可喝酒； 君王千萬不可喝酒； 掌權的不可貪飲烈酒。

en: lest they drink and forget what has been decreed and pervert the rights of all the afflicted.
zh: 恐怕喝了酒，就忘記律例， 把困苦人的一切案件都顛倒了。

en: Give strong drink to the one who is perishing, and wine to those in bitter distress;
zh: 要把烈酒給將要滅亡的人喝； 把酒給心裡愁苦的人喝；

en: let them drink and forget their poverty and remember their misery no more.
zh: 讓他喝了，就忘記自己的貧窮， 也不再記念自己的煩惱。

en: Open your mouth for the mute, for the rights of all who are destitute.
zh: 你要為不能自辯的人開口說話， 為所有貧苦的人伸冤。

en: Open your mouth, judge righteously, defend the rights of the poor and needy.
zh: 你要開口說話，秉公審判， 為困苦和窮乏的人伸冤。”

en: An excellent wife who can find? She is far more precious than jewels.
zh: 有才德的妻子，誰能得著呢？ 她的價值遠勝過紅寶石。

en: The heart of her husband trusts in her, and he will have no lack of gain.
zh: 她丈夫心裡倚靠她， 就不會缺少收入。

en: She does him good, and not harm, all the days of her life.
zh: 她一生的年日， 只帶給丈夫益處，沒有害處。

en: She seeks wool and flax, and works with willing hands.
zh: 她搜求羊毛和細麻， 樂意親手作工。

en: She is like the ships of the merchant; she brings her food from afar.
zh: 她好像一隊商船， 從遠方運來食物。

en: She rises while it is yet night and provides food for her household and portions for her maidens.
zh: 天還未亮，她就起來， 把食物分給家人， 把當作的工分派眾婢女。

en: She considers a field and buys it; with the fruit of her hands she plants a vineyard.
zh: 她選擇了一塊田，就把它買下來， 用自己雙手賺得的收入栽種葡萄園。

en: She dresses herself with strength and makes her arms strong.
zh: 她以能力束腰， 使自己的膀臂有力。

en: She perceives that her merchandise is profitable. Her lamp does not go out at night.
zh: 她知道自己的經營獲利， 她的燈終夜不滅。

en: She puts her hands to the distaff, and her hands hold the spindle.
zh: 她伸手拿著捲線竿， 手掌握著紡錘。

en: She opens her hand to the poor and reaches out her hands to the needy.
zh: 她張手賙濟困苦人， 伸手幫助窮乏人。

en: She is not afraid of snow for her household, for all her household are clothed in scarlet.
zh: 她不因下雪為自己的家人擔心， 因為她全家都穿著溫暖的朱紅色衣服。

en: She makes bed coverings for herself; her clothing is fine linen and purple.
zh: 她為自己做床毯， 她的衣服是細麻和紫色布料做的。

en: Her husband is known in the gates when he sits among the elders of the land.
zh: 她丈夫與本地的長老在城門口同坐， 是眾人都認識的。

en: She makes linen garments and sells them; she delivers sashes to the merchant.
zh: 她做細麻布衣服出售， 又供應腰帶給商人。

en: Strength and dignity are her clothing, and she laughs at the time to come.
zh: 她以能力和威儀為衣服， 想到日後的幸福就歡笑。

en: She opens her mouth with wisdom, and the teaching of kindness is on her tongue.
zh: 她開口就說出智慧的話； 她的舌頭上充滿慈愛的訓誨。

en: She looks well to the ways of her household and does not eat the bread of idleness.
zh: 她監管一切家務， 從不白吃閒飯。

en: Her children rise up and call her blessed; her husband also, and he praises her:
zh: 她的兒女都起來稱她是有福的， 她的丈夫也稱讚她，說：

en: "Many women have done excellently, but you surpass them all."
zh: “有才德的女子很多， 但你比她們更超卓。”

en: Charm is deceitful, and beauty is vain, but a woman who fears the LORD is to be praised.
zh: 艷麗是虛假的，美容是虛浮的； 唯有敬畏耶和華的婦女，必得稱讚。

en: Give her of the fruit of her hands, and let her works praise her in the gates.
zh: 願她享受自己手所作的成果； 願她的工作在城門口使她受稱讚。
